title: Claude Code + Codex global approval state
desc: Current allow list in ~/.claude/settings.json and Codex ~/.codex/config.toml. Prevents repeated permission prompts. Update when adding new tools or projects.
steps: CLAUDE CODE CONFIG: <user-home>/.claude/settings.json -- global allow list for all sessions.

CLAUDE CODE ALLOW LIST (2026-04-28): Bash(*), PowerShell(*), Read(*), Write(*), Edit(*), Glob(*), Grep(*), WebFetch(*), WebSearch(*), mcp__wkappbot__wkappbot, mcp__wkappbot__wkappbot_cli, Bash(python *), Bash(python3 *)
CLAUDE CODE SPECIAL: PowerShell force-swap (wkappbot-core.new->exe), PowerShell test-run-scenario. additionalDirectories: <user-home>/.claude
CLAUDE CODE ADD TOOL: use /update-config skill, or edit settings.json: add ToolName(*) to allow array.
CODEX CONFIG: <user-home>/.codex/config.toml -- global Codex CLI approval.
CODEX STATE (2026-04-28): model=gpt-5.4-mini, reasoning=medium, ask_for_approval=never. Trusted: C:\, <repo-root>, D:\GitHub\WkAutoQuant, D:\GitHub\personal-docs
CODEX SETUP ask_for_approval: edit ~/.codex/config.toml, set ask_for_approval = 'never'. This disables all approval prompts globally.
CODEX TRUST NEW REPO: add section [projects.'D:\GitHub\NewRepo'] trust_level = 'trusted' to config.toml. Or answer yes on first codex run in that dir to auto-add.
author: claude
